top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Group to Sell Chicago Parking Meters to Stonepeak
top_signals.summary: A Morgan Stanley-led group has reached a deal to sell its lease of Chicago’s parking meters to New York-based Stonepeak, Mayor Brandon Johnson’s office said on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DOE issues order to keep Michigan coal-fired power plant operating
top_signals.summary: Order directs J.H. Campbell coal-power plant in West Olive to take all steps necessary to remain available to operate and to minimize costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
